assessment_objectives.objective: Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Autonomous Technologies (AAT) supporting documentation contains contact details of the provider.
Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Autonomous Technologies (AAT) supporting documentation contains characteristics, capabilities and limitations of performance of the AAT.
Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Autonomous Technologies (AAT) supporting documentation contains errata from the AAT's initial conformity assessment.
Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Autonomous Technologies (AAT) supporting documentation contains details necessary to interpret the outputs of the AAT.
Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Autonomous Technologies (AAT) supporting documentation contains human oversight measures necessary to facilitate the interpretation of the outputs of the AAT.
Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Autonomous Technologies (AAT) supporting documentation contains computational and hardware resources needed to operate the AAT.
Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Autonomous Technologies (AAT) supporting documentation contains projected useable lifetime of the AAT.

Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Autonomous Technologies (AAT) supporting documentation contains a description of the mechanisms included within the AAT system to properly collect, store and interpret event logs.
